title: Senior Financial Analyst - Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
company: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners!
